original: KihaCorp’s popular companion droid line has numerous accessories and addons available for purchase across the galaxy. Some of the most popular are the hot-swappable genitals they’re equipped with, in particular variant phalli and vaginas.\n\nThis one is average-sized, designed to be the spitting image of a handsome terran’s. It includes its own silicone reservoir and pumps to minimize impact on the android’s body shape during erections.
